title: Pan-Seared Middle Eastern-Style Tofu
description: A flavorful and healthy dish that combines the richness of tagine with the simplicity of pan-seared tofu. Serve as a main course or as a snack.
instructions: 1. Press the tofu to remove excess moisture.
3. In a shallow dish, whisk together the soy sauce, spice blend, and lemon juice.
4. Add the tofu to the marinade and toss to coat.
5. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Remove the tofu from the marinade and add to the skillet.
7. Cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown.
8. Garnish with parsley and serve hot.
9. Serve with tagine sauce for dipping.
